concerns.text: The 'NOAA Geomagnetic Indices' dataset is listed as '*Verified Source Pending*' with no URL. The plan states it will 'proceed assuming the implementation will fetch from the official NOAA SWPC FTP/HTTP endpoint'. This violates the Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) and the Plan's own 'Dataset Strategy' which requires all URLs to be sourced exclusively from the `# Verified datasets` block. A plan cannot assume a verified source will be identified later; the specific, reachable URL must be present in the planning artifact to ensure the dataset is real and appropriate before implementation begins.

The plan acknowledges a 'Critical Gap' regarding the NOAA source but proceeds with the analysis design. Since the NOAA Kp/Dst data is a primary input required for the correlation analysis (FR-001, FR-003), the absence of a verified, reachable URL for this dataset renders the entire data pipeline infeasible as planned. The plan must either identify a verified URL in the block or explicitly state that the project cannot proceed without it, rather than deferring this critical dependency to the implementation phase.
